allow: Bash(node -e "import\('node:sqlite'\).then\(\({DatabaseSync}\)=>{const db=new DatabaseSync\('data/assets.db'\);db.prepare\(\\"UPDATE users SET role='admin' WHERE email='mvinet'\\"\).run\(\);const u=db.prepare\('SELECT id,email,role FROM users'\).all\(\);console.log\(u\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('node:sqlite'\).then\(\({DatabaseSync}\)=>{const db=new DatabaseSync\('data/assets.db'\);try{db.exec\('ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN suspended INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0'\);console.log\('Migration OK'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('Colonne déjà présente:',e.message\)}}\)")
